testcase.name: verifyTitle

failure.message: expected [Online Shopping site in India: Shop Online for Mobiles, Books, Watches, Shoes and More - Amazon.in] but found [Amazon.in]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Online Shopping site in India: Shop Online for Mobiles, Books, Watches, Shoes and More - Amazon.in] but found [Amazon.in] at My_Test.Program1.verifyTitle(Program1.java:26) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ...
